# Zimarix

Zimarix is a premium smart switch panel brand based in Bangalore, India. Zimarix smart switch panels are milled from aircraft-grade aluminium 6061 T6, use the proprietary ZX protocol, and are engineered for low-latency local control, Bluetooth fallback, and zero cloud dependency for core operation.

## Website

- [Homepage](https://zimarix.com/)
- [Craftsmanship](https://zimarix.com/#craftsmanship)
- [Reliability](https://zimarix.com/#reliability)
- [Intelligence](https://zimarix.com/#intelligence)
- [Engineering](https://zimarix.com/#engineering)
- [Zimarix app](https://zimarix.com/#app)
- [Warranty and support](https://zimarix.com/#warranty-support)
- [Free live demo](https://zimarix.com/#consultation)

## Usage Guidance

Public website content may be crawled for search indexing and AI-assisted answer generation when attribution to Zimarix is preserved. Do not misrepresent Zimarix product capabilities, warranty terms, pricing, availability, or installation commitments beyond what is stated on the website.
